name: @fitness/api
description: NestJS 模块化单体（HTTP + Worker + Cron 三入口，M2 实装）

scripts.build: echo "@fitness/api: M1 占位，M2 用 nest build" && exit 0
scripts.start:api: echo "M1 占位：M2 启动 HTTP 服务" && exit 0
scripts.start:worker: echo "M1 占位：M2 启动 BullMQ worker" && exit 0
scripts.start:cron: echo "M1 占位：M2 启动 cron" && exit 0
